name: Thompson Sampling
description: Efficiently search synthesis on demand databases given your reagent smiles and reaction SMARTS. Use active learning to search the reagent space to screen large un-enumerated libraries such as Enamine REAL SPACE.
capabilities: Efficiently search synthesis on demand databases given your reagent smiles and reaction SMARTS
Use active learning to search the reagent space to screen large un-enumerated libraries such as Enamine REAL SPACE

reagent_smiles.description: CSV file with reagent SMILES strings

reaction_smarts.description: Reaction SMARTS defining the chemical transformation
